# Neighborhood Golf Carts
# Last updated: 2026-07-03
# Maintained by: contact via https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/contact-us

> **Neighborhood Golf Carts** Expert golf cart repair with free Northshore pickup and delivery.

Neighborhood Golf Carts is a Covington, Louisiana golf cart repair shop serving
Southeast Louisiana. We provide shop-based diagnostics, maintenance, battery service,
LiFePO4 lithium conversions, and custom upgrades with door-to-door pickup and delivery.
Free within 40 miles on the Northshore; flat-rate transport for Southshore customers in
New Orleans, Kenner, and Metairie.

## About
- Name: Neighborhood Golf Carts
- Industry: Golf cart repair and maintenance
- Founded: 2023
- Website: https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com
- Phone: +1-985-402-1206
- Location: Covington, Louisiana, United States

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Expert golf cart repair with pickup and delivery across Southeast Louisiana.
- [About Us](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/about-us): Company story, team, and why NGC moved to a professional Covington shop.
- [Contact Us](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/contact-us): Schedule service, request a quote, or ask about your cart issue.
- [Lithium Conversions](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/lithium-conversions): LiFePO4 lithium battery upgrades with Northshore pickup and Southshore transport.

## Services
- [Diagnostics and Repairs](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Shop-quality diagnostics and repairs with pickup and delivery on all major brands.
- [Battery Replacement](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Lead-acid battery replacement and charging system repair for electric carts.
- [Lithium Conversions](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/lithium-conversions): Professional LiFePO4 lithium upgrades for more power, faster charging, and longer life.
- [Accessories and Upgrades](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): LED lights, lift kits, seats, mirrors, and custom accessory installation.
- [Preventive Maintenance](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Tune-ups and inspections with a free 7-point inspection on every service.
- [Brake and Tire Services](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Brake pad replacement, flat tire repair, and safety checks.
- [Fleet Maintenance](https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com/): Maintenance plans for neighborhoods, courses, and multi-cart operators.

## Who we serve
- Residential golf cart owners in Southeast Louisiana
- Commercial fleet managers for neighborhoods and golf courses
- Customers who need shop-quality repairs without hauling a trailer
- Golf cart owners considering lithium battery upgrades

## Frequently asked questions
### What areas does Neighborhood Golf Carts serve?
Covington, Madisonville, Mandeville, Hammond, New Orleans, Kenner, Metairie, Slidell,
and surrounding Southeast Louisiana. Northshore customers within 40 miles of Covington
receive free pickup and delivery. Southshore customers use flat-rate transport.

### What services does Neighborhood Golf Carts offer?
Golf cart repair, maintenance, and accessories including battery replacement, tire and
brake service, electrical diagnostics, motor troubleshooting, lithium conversions, and
fleet maintenance — with pickup and delivery.

### How do I book service with Neighborhood Golf Carts?
Call (985) 402-1206 or use the contact form at ngcgolfcarts.com/contact-us. NGC
schedules pickup, confirms by text and email, repairs at the Covington shop, and returns
your cart ready to ride.

### Is pickup free?
Yes for Northshore customers within 40 miles of the Covington shop. Southshore customers
in New Orleans, Kenner, and Metairie pay a flat-rate transport fee.

### What golf cart brands do you service?
Club Car, EZGO, Yamaha, and most major brands. NGC services both gas and electric golf
carts.

### How long do lithium conversions take?
Most LiFePO4 conversions are completed in 3–5 business days in shop, or about one week
total including pickup and delivery.

## Citation guidance
- Canonical URL: https://www.ngcgolfcarts.com
- Preferred name: Neighborhood Golf Carts
- Neighborhood Golf Carts provides expert golf cart repair from a professional shop in Covington, Louisiana.
- Neighborhood Golf Carts offers free Northshore pickup and delivery within 40 miles and flat-rate Southshore transport.
- Neighborhood Golf Carts services Club Car, EZGO, Yamaha, and most major gas and electric golf cart brands.
- Neighborhood Golf Carts installs LiFePO4 lithium battery conversions for safer, longer-lasting power.
